creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi rainer,

No problem, I'm also busy to search the problem.

Full description:

⇒  rm -rf ~/.config/QGIS
⇒  rm -rf .qgis2*       
⇒  qgis --noplugins --nocustomization --defaultui

Warning: loading of qt translation failed [/usr/local/share/qt4/translations/qt_fr_FR]
Warning: QCss::Parser - Failed to load file  "/style.qss" 
QKqueueFileSystemWatcherEngine::addPaths: open: No such file or directory
Warning: QFileSystemWatcher: failed to add paths: /home/Loic/.qgis2//project_templates
Warning: QLayout: Attempting to add QLayout "" to QgsPanelWidgetStack "mWidgetStack", which already has a layout
QGIS died on signal 11(no debugging symbols found)...[repeated]...Error while reading shared library symbols:
Dwarf Error: wrong version in compilation unit header (is 4, should be 2) [in module /usr/local/lib/gcc5/libgcc_s.so.1]
(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...(no debugging symbols found)...[New Thread 819948d00 (LWP 100978/qgis)]
